settings.displayLanguageDesc: Choose the interface language you want to use.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the appearance mode that suits you.
settings.publicProfileDesc: Update your avatar, display name, and bio.
settings.socialLinksDesc: Connect social accounts to display them on your profile.
settings.securityDesc: Manage your password and other security options.
settings.twoFactorAuthDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all your data.
settings.privacyDescription: Control who can see your profile and activity.

privacy.whoCanFollowDesc: When disabled, no one can follow you and your profile is private.
privacy.whoCanMessageDesc: Choose who is allowed to start a conversation with you.
privacy.blockedAccountsDesc: People you've blocked cannot follow you, message you, or see your profile.
privacy.everyoneFollowDesc: Any user on VocaLab can follow you
privacy.friendsFollowDesc: Only mutual followers (friends) can follow you
privacy.nobodyFollowDesc: No one can follow you, your profile is closed
privacy.everyoneMessageDesc: Any user on VocaLab can message you
privacy.followersMessageDesc: Only your followers can start a conversation
privacy.friendsMessageDesc: Only mutual followers (friends) can message you
privacy.nobodyMessageDesc: No one can send you a message
privacy.followersTab: Who can see your followers tab
privacy.followersTabDesc: Choose who can view your list of followers.
privacy.followingTab: Who can see your following tab
privacy.followingTabDesc: Choose who can view the people you follow.
privacy.friendTab: Who can see your friends tab
privacy.friendTabDesc: Choose who can view your mutual friends.

settings.notificationsDescription: Customize email, push, and in-app notifications.

notifications.chatMessagesDesc: When you receive a new chat message.
notifications.commentsDesc: When someone comments on your blog posts or replies to your comments.
notifications.upvotesDesc: When someone likes your posts or comments.
notifications.activityFromFollowedDesc: When people you follow post something new.

settings.learningDescription: Track your progress and learning preferences.

common.pageNotFoundDesc: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

auth.updatePasswordDesc: Update the password for your account.
auth.setPasswordDesc: Since you signed in with Google, set a password so you can log in with email later.
auth.enterPasswordMin6: Enter a password with at least 6 characters
auth.setupTwoFactorDesc: Use Google Authenticator or Authy to scan the QR code and secure your account.
auth.step1: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy,...) on your phone.
auth.step2: Choose QR scanning and scan the image above.
auth.step3: Enter the verification code from your app and confirm.
auth.enterOtpToContinue: Enter the OTP code from your authenticator app to continue.

errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Server error, please try again later.
errors.BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request, please check your input.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested content was not found.
errors.CONFLICT: This data already exists in our system.
errors.EXPIRED_TOKEN: Session expired, please log in again.
errors.OTP_INVALID: The verification code is incorrect or has expired.
errors.GOOGLE_AUTH_REQUIRED: This account uses Google Login. Please sign in with Google.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Session has expired, please log in again.
errors.DATABASE_ERROR: Unable to process data at this time.
errors.FOREIGN_KEY_FAILED: Data link is invalid or currently in use.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: This email address is already registered.
errors.GOOGLE_PROFILE_INCOMPLETE: Google profile is missing email or ID. Please try again.
errors.GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_ALREADY_LINKED: This account is already linked to a different Google account.
errors.PASSWORD_ALREADY_EXISTS: You already have a password. Please use the change password feature instead.
errors.PASSWORD_NOT_SET: You are using Google login. Please set a password before changing it.
errors.NEW_PASSWORD_SAME_AS_OLD: The new password cannot be the same as the old password.
errors.GOOGLE_EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: Email address not found from Google account.
errors.BLOG_ACCESS_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to view this blog post.
errors.BLOG_EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to edit this blog post.
errors.BLOG_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to delete this blog post.
errors.COMMENT_EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to edit this comment.
errors.COMMENT_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to delete this comment.
errors.GRAMMAR_EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to edit this grammar structure.
errors.GRAMMAR_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to delete this grammar structure.
errors.GROUP_NOT_FOUND_OR_INACTIVE: The group does not exist or is no longer active.
errors.GROUP_MEMBER_FORBIDDEN: You are not a member of this group.
errors.ONLY_OWNER_ALLOWED: Only the owner has permission to perform this action.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.GROUP_MEMBER_NOT_FOUND: Member not found in this group.
errors.ALL_MEMBERS_ALREADY_EXISTS: All members are already in the group.
errors.CANNOT_CHANGE_GROUP_OWNER_ROLE: Cannot change the role of the group owner.
errors.CANNOT_CHANGE_HIGHER_ROLE: Cannot change the role of a higher-ranking member.
errors.CANNOT_CHANGE_SAME_LEVEL_ROLE: Cannot change the role of a member at the same level.
errors.PERMISSION_RECORDS_NOT_FOUND: Permission records not found in the system.
errors.ONLY_GROUP_OWNER_CAN_DELETE: Only the group owner can delete the group.
errors.GROUP_INACTIVE_OR_NOT_FOUND: The group does not exist or is no longer active.
errors.ALREADY_GROUP_MEMBER: You are already a member of this group.
errors.OWNER_CANNOT_LEAVE_GROUP: The group owner cannot leave the group. Please transfer ownership to another member or delete the group.
errors.CANNOT_REMOVE_GROUP_OWNER: Cannot remove the group owner from the member list.
errors.ONLY_OWNER_CAN_TRANSFER_OWNERSHIP: Only the group owner can transfer ownership.
errors.NEW_OWNER_MUST_BE_MEMBER: The new owner must be a member of the group.
errors.MESSAGE_CONTENT_OR_ATTACHMENTS_REQUIRED: Message must have content or attachments.
errors.MESSAGE_TARGET_REQUIRED: Message must have receiverId or groupId.
errors.UPLOAD_FILE_REQUIRED: Please provide a file to upload.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND_BY_USERNAME: User with this username not found.
errors.PRIVATE_POST_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to view this private post.
errors.PRIVATE_FOLLOWERS_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to view this private followers list.
errors.PRIVATE_FOLLOWING_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to view this private following list.
errors.PRIVATE_FRIENDS_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to view this private friends list.
errors.FOLLOW_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to follow.
errors.LINK_EDIT_PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to edit this link.
errors.LINK_DELETE_PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to delete this link.
errors.FIELD_NOT_IN_CARD_TYPE: Some fields do not belong to the selected card type.
errors.CARD_NOT_FOUND_OR_FORBIDDEN: Card not found or you do not have permission.
errors.CARD_TYPE_FIELDS_UNDEFINED: This card type has no defined data fields.

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Update your full name, username, email and avatar.
profile.noPostsHint: New posts will appear here when available.
profile.noResultsHint: Try searching with different keywords or check the spelling.
profile.noFriendsHint: Friends are people who follow each other. The friend list will appear here.
profile.noFollowingHint: People followed by this profile will appear here.

vocabulary.cardTypeLoadFailed: Failed to load the card type
vocabulary.deleteCardTypeDesc: NOTE: All cards using this card type will also be permanently deleted from every collection.
